---
title: "GLHLTH 562 Project: Global Measles Cases v.s. Measles Vaccine Coverage"
format: revealjs
editor: visual
---

# Topic Overview

-   Especially since the COVID-19 pandemic, vaccine mistrust has increased significantly throughout the world

-   Rising vaccine hesitancy has been recognized as a global problem by WHO

-   Potential impacts of reduced vaccines are extensive

    -   For example, resurgence of measles in the U.S.

-   Outbreaks are not constrained to geographic borders

# App Overview

**Goal:** understand the potential relationship between **vaccine coverage** and **global measles outbreaks**

-   Shiny App

    -   Incorporates API integration and a GenAI model

    -   Analyze trends in global measles cases and measles vaccination coverage (MCV1, MCV2)

# App Overview

**Goal:** understand the potential relationship between **vaccine coverage** and **global measles outbreaks**

-   Data Sources

    -   Our World in Data

    -   WHO Global Health Observatory API

    -   World Bank API

# Project Site:

**https://laurenlloyd.shinyapps.io/562final/**
